verificationNote: AI-generated indicative risk register for ISO 27001 ISMS. Risk scores are illustrative — organizations must calibrate to their own environment and risk appetite.
title: Information Security Risk Register
description: Register of information security risks aligned to ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A themes

risks.title: Ransomware Attack on Critical Systems
risks.description: Ransomware encrypts critical business systems and data, causing extended operational disruption and potential data loss.
risks.treatmentPlan: Deploy zero-trust architecture, conduct quarterly ransomware exercises, implement microsegmentation.

risks.title: Insider Threat — Data Exfiltration
risks.description: Malicious or negligent insider exfiltrates sensitive data through email, cloud storage, or removable media.
risks.treatmentPlan: Enhance UBA rules, implement content-aware DLP policies, increase monitoring of high-privilege users.

risks.title: Cloud Service Provider Breach
risks.description: Security breach at a cloud service provider exposes organizational data or disrupts cloud-hosted services.
existingControls: Encryption of data at rest and in transit
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement CASB, enhance cloud monitoring, develop cloud exit strategy.

risks.title: Privileged Account Compromise
risks.description: Administrative credentials are compromised through phishing, credential stuffing, or supply chain attack, enabling lateral movement.
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement just-in-time privileged access, deploy credential rotation, enhance privileged session monitoring.

risks.title: Third-Party Supply Chain Compromise
risks.description: Compromise of a software or service supplier leads to malicious code injection or unauthorized access through the supply chain.
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement SBOM requirements, enhance vendor monitoring, deploy software composition analysis in CI/CD.

risks.title: Data Classification Failure
risks.description: Sensitive information is misclassified or unclassified, leading to inadequate protection and potential unauthorized disclosure.
risks.treatmentPlan: Deploy automated classification tools, implement data discovery scanning, enhance classification training.

risks.title: Physical Intrusion to Data Centre
risks.description: Unauthorized physical access to data centre or server room resulting in equipment theft, tampering, or service disruption.
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement mantrap entry, upgrade CCTV analytics, conduct periodic penetration tests of physical controls.

risks.title: Unpatched Vulnerability Exploitation
risks.description: Known vulnerabilities in systems or applications are exploited before patches are applied, enabling unauthorized access or data breach.
risks.treatmentPlan: Reduce critical patch SLA to 72 hours, implement automated patching for standard systems, expand vulnerability management scope.

risks.title: Regulatory Non-Compliance
risks.description: Failure to comply with applicable data protection, privacy, or sector-specific regulations resulting in fines and reputational damage.
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement automated regulatory change tracking, enhance compliance testing program, conduct regulatory gap assessments.

risks.title: Backup Failure and Data Loss
risks.description: Backup systems fail or backup data is corrupted, resulting in inability to recover critical data after an incident.
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement immutable backup storage, increase restoration test frequency to monthly, deploy backup monitoring dashboard.
